Swansfield Neighborhood Playground.note: CSV had only 'Harper's Choice, Columbia, MD'. 5659 Cedar Lane is the Swansfield Mini Water Park / Tot Lots HC15+HC16 location per Columbia Association.

Cedar Lane Park East Playground.note: CSV had only 'Cedar Lane Path'. 10745 Route 108 = 10745 Clarksville Pike is the Cedar Lane Park East entrance per howardcountymd.gov.
